title: bouea oppositifolia
intro: Bouea oppositifolia, also known as the buah keras or keras, is a tropical tree species native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high tannin content, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bouea oppositifolia include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent, among others. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or infused in hot water to reap its medicinal benefits.
